title: IRYNA Double Sided Sticky Pads Round Adhesive Pads Sticky Pads Heavy Duty Strong Mounting Adhesive Foam Pads Ideal for Indoor and Outdoor Pack of 20(2 x 25mm)
features: 【What You Get】Package includes 20 pieces of 3M double sided adhesive pads, waterproof, heavy duty strong mounting adhesive, providing convenience and simplicity for many interior and exterior bonding applications.

【Premium Material】Made with high quality EVA sponge and 3M glue, diameter: 25mm, thickness: 2mm, white, these sticky foam tapes are viscoelasticity in nature, giving the foam energy absorption and stress relaxation properties
【Easy to Use】Just tear off the cover paper and you can decorate your room as you like. When you don't need it, you can remove the pad without worrying about damaging your walls.

【Waterproof Tape】Our double-sided tape will not melt and is very durable. Waterproof, moisture-proof, non-corrosive, can be used in the bathroom, the double-sided tape is closely attached to the object, and the viscosity is not easily affected by water.
【Wide Application】100% New Brand ! 3M rubber pad perfect to fix your dash cam, car phone holder, car accessories, carpets, sofa cushions, murals, bathroom accessories, and more.
description: Double Sided Sticky Pads Round Adhesive Pads Sticky Pads Heavy Duty Strong Mounting Adhesive Foam Pads Ideal For Indoor And Outdoor Pack Of 20 2 X 25Mm
